zh.Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德
zh.Redbourne, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾雷德布恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Crèvecoeur於大約1163年出生在英國英格蘭爾切斯特時，她的父親Alexander de Crèvecoeur25歲，母親Amabel FitzSwain22歲。她於1190年與Sir William FitzAdams在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1247年享年86歲。

zh-hans.Redbourne, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾雷德布恩
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Crèvecoeur于大约1163年出生在英国英格兰爾切斯特时，她的父亲Alexander de Crèvecoeur25岁，母亲Amabel FitzSwain22岁。她于1190年与Sir William FitzAdams在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1247年享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Crèvecoeur was born about 1163, in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Alexander de Crèvecoeur, was 25 and her mother, Amabel FitzSwain, was 22. She married Sir William FitzAdams in 1190, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died about 1247, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Crèvecoeur est née environ 1163, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander de Crèvecoeur, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Amabel FitzSwain, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William FitzAdams en 1190, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1247, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Crèvecoeur um 1163 in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander de Crèvecoeur 25 und ihre Mutter Amabel FitzSwain 22. Sie hat 1190 in Somerset, England Sir William FitzAdams geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb um 1247 im Alter von 86 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Crèvecoeur è nata il circa 1163 nel Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Alexander de Crèvecoeur, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Amabel FitzSwain, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir William FitzAdams nel 1190, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1247, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Crèvecoeurが約1163年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで生まれた時，父Alexander de Crèvecoeurは25歳，母Amabel FitzSwainは22歳であった。1190年にイギリスソメルセトでSir William FitzAdamsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1247年に86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Crèvecoeur(이)가 대략 1163년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander de Crèvecoeur(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amabel FitzSwain(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1190년 영국 서머세트에서 Sir William FitzAdams(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1247년 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Crèvecoeur nasceu aproximadamente 1163, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alexander de Crèvecoeur, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Amabel FitzSwain, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William FitzAdams em 1190, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1247, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Crèvecoeur родилась около 1163 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Alexander de Crèvecoeur было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Amabel FitzSwain, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William FitzAdams в 1190 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла около 1247 г. в возрасте 86 лет.

Se casó con Sir William FitzAdams en 1190, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1247, a la edad de 86 años.
